action.reasoning: Observation: After 300 total epochs, best val MAE = 2.6837 (improved from 2.71). Loss still declining from 0.220 to 0.214. Previous eval gave mae_60min=3.4285. Analysis: Model is still improving but slowly. With 1.36h remaining, I should submit eval first to measure current performance, then decide on further training. The last 150-epoch run took ~56 min which is too long given remaining time. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint.
